changes: Changing classes or jobs in a sanctuary will no longer incur a penalty to action cooldowns.
Adrenaline Rush action 'Aegis Boon' added: Temporarily reduces damage taken by all party members by 50%.
Adrenaline Rush action 'Raw Destruction' added: Delivers an attack to a single target.
Adrenaline Rush action 'Cometeor' added: Deals unaspected damage to all enemies near point of impact.
Adrenaline Rush action 'Empyrean Rain' added: Restores 50% of own HP and the HP of all nearby party members, as well as cures all status effects.
Adrenaline Rush action 'Empyrean Rain' added: Restores 50% of own HP and the HP of all nearby party members, as well as cures all status effects.

new_content.name: Main Scenario Quests
new_content.description: New story quests: Good Intentions, Bait and Switch, Best Laid Schemes, The Rising Chorus, Aether on Demand, On the Counteroffensive, and two ??? quests.
new_content.location: The Rising Stones, Eastern Thanalan, Northern Thanalan

new_content.name: Chronicles of a New Era Quests
new_content.description: New quests: The World of Darkness, The Light of Hope, But I Hardly Noah, The Gift of the Archmagus, and Fear and Odin in the Shroud.

new_content.name: Hildibrand Quests
new_content.description: New side story quests: Shades of Sil'dih, Sibling Strife, Beneath the Mask, Truths Untold, and Her Last Vow.
new_content.location: Ul'dah – Steps of Thal, Western Thanalan

new_content.name: Delivery Moogle Quests
new_content.description: New side story quests: Thanks For Your Support and Hostages to Fortune.

new_content.name: Aetherial Wheels
new_content.description: System to convert stored energy into company actions.

new_content.name: Retainer Estate Placement
new_content.description: System allowing retainers to be placed on estate grounds.

housing.name: Level 1 Aetherial Wheel Stand
housing.description: A metal stand upon which aetherial wheels are placed and spun to charge.

housing.name: Spotted Interior Wall
housing.description: An interior wall bespeckled with a hypnotically random pattern of colorful dots certain to drive any sane man to his wit's end.

housing.name: Wavy Interior Wall
housing.description: An interior wall covered from top to bottom in colorful wavy lines certain to induce seasickness in even the most hardened sailor.

housing.name: Star Chandellier
housing.description: Ceiling-mounted lighting expertly crafted to resemble the moon and stars.

housing.name: Tatami Flooring
housing.description: Woven from sweet-smelling rush grass, tatami flooring is the perfect compliment to any home furnished in the Doman fashion.

housing.name: Monochrome Flooring
housing.description: Marble floor tiling alternately colored black and white.

housing.name: Oasis Cobble Flooring
housing.description: Cobbles commonly used in Ul'dahn roadways and plazas.

housing.name: Dried Well
housing.description: This quality stone well, manufactured in Eorzea with 100% Eorzean materials, requires no hole to be dug.

housing.name: Oriental Striking Dummy
housing.description: A striking dummy designed in the Doman fashion.

housing.name: Wild Banana Tree
housing.description: A green, leafy tree transplanted from an island in the Cieldalaes.

housing.name: Personal Astroscope
housing.description: A miniature astroscope used by aspiring astrologians to peer into the farthest reaches of the firmament.

housing.name: Riviera Garden Table Set
housing.description: A round outdoor table and matching chair designed in the riviera fashion.

housing.name: Dodo's Nest
housing.description: A nest used by dodos to prevent the growth of molds harmful to their offspring.

housing.name: Retainer Cartonnier
housing.description: A wooden receptacle for use by retainers to store goods entrusted for sale.

housing.name: Retainer Counter
housing.description: A wooden counter for use by retainers.

housing.name: Syrcus Tower
housing.description: An expertly crafted representation of the Syrcus Tower.

housing.name: Large Wall Chronometer
housing.description: A precision instrument for telling time. Suitable for hanging on walls.

housing.name: Oriental Bathtub
housing.description: A large bathtub designed in the Doman fashion.

housing.name: Frolicking Beasts
housing.description: A folding partition commonly found in Far East nations.

housing.name: Oriental Partition
housing.description: A partition designed in the Doman fashion, reaching to the ceiling.

housing.name: Dead Man's Chest
housing.description: A sturdy treasure coffer removed from Sastasha.

housing.name: Oak Low Barrel Planter
housing.description: A barrel planter crafted from oak.

housing.name: Royal Partition
housing.description: A luxurious partition designed to resemble those used in the sultana's palace.

housing.name: Kotatsu Table
housing.description: A table designed in the Doman fashion that emits heat.

housing.name: Guildleve Counter
housing.description: A counter designed to replicate those found in Adventurers' Guilds.

housing.name: Order of Nald'Thal Lectern
housing.description: A carved wooden podium used to deliver sermons.

housing.name: Pine Bonsai
housing.description: A traditional Doman gardening technique reflecting a beautiful form of art.

housing.name: Wax Vegetables
housing.description: Wax replicas of vegetables for table decoration.

housing.name: Glade Tea Set
housing.description: A tea set for relaxing the mind.

housing.name: Riviera Supper Set
housing.description: A multiple course extravaganza dinner set.

housing.name: Oasis Breakfast Set
housing.description: A luxury breakfast set for the Ul'dahn elite.

housing.name: Scattered Documents
housing.description: A pile of parchment from 'The Last Paean', giving any study an air of sophistication.

housing.name: Valentione's Cake
housing.description: A decadent chocolate cake emblazoned with the House Valentione coat of arms.

housing.name: Oriental Altar
housing.description: A miniature wooden altar hung in Doman houses.

housing.name: Oriental Wall Scroll
housing.description: An ornamental scroll painted with the Doman character for 'mankind'.

glamour.name: The Emperor's New Hat
glamour.description: The most beautiful headwear you never have seen.

glamour.name: The Emperor's New Robe
glamour.description: The most beautiful robe you never have seen.

glamour.name: The Emperor's New Gloves
glamour.description: The most beautiful handwear you never have seen.

glamour.name: The Emperor's New Breeches
glamour.description: The most beautiful legwear you never have seen.

glamour.name: The Emperor's New Boots
glamour.description: The most beautiful footwear you never have seen.
